query: Could you help me create a 7-day travel plan starting on March 18th, 2022, and ending on March 24th, 2022? The trip will start in Washington and I would like to visit 3 cities in Minnesota. This trip is for one person with a budget of $7,200.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Washington to Bemidji, duration: 20 hours 8 mins, distance: 2,120 km, cost: 106
plan.attraction: Paul Bunyan & Babe the Blue Ox Statues; Headwaters Science Center; Diamond Point Park;
plan.dinner: Chao Chinese Bistro - Holiday Inn Jaipur City Centre
plan.accommodation: A small bedroom, Lower East Side

plan.attraction: Beltrami County History Center; Cameron Park; Paul Bunyan Animal Land;
plan.accommodation: A small bedroom, Lower East Side

plan.attraction: Bemidji City Park; Shaynowishkung Statue; Mississippi Headwaters State Forest;

plan.attraction: Minneapolis Sculpture Garden; Minneapolis Institute of Art; Mill City Museum;
plan.accommodation: Light-filled Apartment in great area, close 2 all!

plan.attraction: Gold Medal Park; Foshay Museum and Observation Deck; Minnehaha Falls;
